text:
If the RAP submission is based on verbal orders, the verbal order 
must be recorded in the plan of care, include a description of the patient's condition and 
the services to be provided by the home health agency, include an attestation (relating to 
the physician's or allowed practitioner’s orders and the date received per 42 CFR 409.43), 
and the plan of care is copied and immediately submitted to the physician or allowed 
practitioner. A billable visit must be rendered prior to the
